name: Orchestra BioMed Holdings, Inc.
business: Orchestra BioMed is a biomedical innovation company that develops high-impact medical technologies through risk-reward-sharing partnerships with leading medical device companies. Its flagship product candidates are AVIM Therapy for hypertension and Virtue SAB for atherosclerotic artery disease. The company has an exclusive collaboration with Medtronic for AVIM Therapy and has entered into a termination and right of first refusal agreement with Terumo for Virtue SAB.
sellsTo: patients with hypertension who are indicated for a pacemaker

exposures.sentence: Our flagship product candidates are Atrioventricular Interval Modulation Therapy ( AVIM Therapy ) for the treatment of hypertension ( HTN ), the leading risk factor for death worldwide, and Virtue Sirolimus AngioInfusion Balloon ( Virtue SAB ) for the treatment of atherosclerotic artery disease, the leading cause of mortality worldwide.

Virtue SAB is a proprietary drug/device combination product candidate for the treatment of artery disease that is designed to deliver a large liquid dose of proprietary, investigational, extended-release formulation of sirolimus ( SirolimusEFR ) to the vessel wall during balloon angioplasty without the need for balloon coating or a permanent implant.

catalysts.sentence: We are actively conducting a double-blind, randomized, global pivotal study (the BACKBEAT study ), enrolling up to 500 patients with uncontrolled hypertension who are indicated for a Medtronic dual-chamber pacemaker, with enrollment completion currently planned for mid-2026.

We recently initiated patient enrollments in the Virtue SAB in the Treatment of Coronary In-Stent Restenosis ( ISR ) Trial (the Virtue Trial ) for our U.S. investigational device exemption ( IDE ) pivotal study randomizing Virtue SAB vs. Boston Scientific Corporation s AGENT drug-coated balloon, with enrollment completion currently planned for mid-2027.

catalysts.event: Receipt of $20 million from Medtronic Loan Agreement
catalysts.sentence: Future committed cash receipts expected in April 2026 include $20.0 million from the Medtronic Loan Agreement (as such term is defined in Note 16 to the Consolidated Financial Statements Debt Financing ), and an additional $15.0 million from Ligand pursuant to the Royalty Purchase Agreement.

catalysts.event: Receipt of second installment from Ligand Royalty Purchase Agreement
catalysts.sentence: Future committed cash receipts expected in April 2026 include $20.0 million from the Medtronic Loan Agreement, and an additional $15.0 million from Ligand pursuant to the Royalty Purchase Agreement.

catalysts.event: Receipt of upfront payment from Haemonetics acquisition of Vivasure
catalysts.sentence: On January 9, 2026, we received $4.7 million pursuant to the sale of our Vivasure investment.

tamClaims.claim: The annual addressable market for pacemaker-indicated patients with HTN comprises more than 1,000,000 patients worldwide per year and represents a potential annual revenue opportunity of over $2.4 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that the total addressable market for pacemaker-indicated patients with HTN comprises more than 1,000,000 patients worldwide per year and represents a potential annual revenue opportunity for us and Medtronic of over $2.4 billion.

tamClaims.claim: The annual market for selected non-pacemaker patients with uncontrolled hypertension and high cardiovascular risk comprises at least 3.7 million patients worldwide and represents a potential annual revenue opportunity of over $15 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: We further estimate that the annual market for highly selected patients with uncontrolled hypertension that are not yet indicated for a pacemaker but have high cardiovascular risk and key co-morbidities, including HFpEF, comprises at least 3.7 million patients worldwide, or approximately 0.3% of the global HTN population, and represents a potential annual revenue opportunity for Orchestra BioMed and a strategic partner of over $15 billion.

tamClaims.claim: The annual global addressable market opportunity for Virtue SAB in coronary ISR, coronary small vessel disease and peripheral artery disease below-the-knee is at least $10 billion, based on approximately 5 million procedures.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that these indications will represent an annual global addressable market opportunity of at least $10 billion, based on approximately 5 million procedures.
